name: Marriott Bonvoy Boundless® Credit Card

welcome_offer.description: 100,000 bonus Marriott Bonvoy points after spending $5,000 in first 3 months (worth ~$700 toward Marriott hotel stays at 0.7¢/point)

earning_rates.notes: 6x points at Marriott hotels (earn 6x as the base card earning)

annual_credits.name: Anniversary Free Night
annual_credits.description: Free night certificate each year valid at Marriott hotels costing up to 35,000 points

other_benefits.name: Automatic Silver Elite Status
other_benefits.description: Marriott Bonvoy Silver Elite status (10% bonus on earned points, priority late checkout, and more)

other_benefits.name: 15 Elite Night Credits
other_benefits.description: 15 qualifying nights toward higher Marriott elite status each year

other_benefits.name: Free Night Award
other_benefits.description: Earn a free night award every 60,000 qualifying points spent

notes: Popular mid-tier Marriott card. $95 AF is offset by annual free night (up to 35K = often $70-100 value). 15 elite nights + Silver status provides decent base perks. Gas/grocery bonus categories help offset the AF. Good companion for Bonvoy members who stay at Marriott properties a few times a year.
